# MaximumAI

> Interactive demo of an AI chatbot platform built for small business lead capture, featuring RAG retrieval debugging, a prompt playground, and conversation intelligence.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Analytics overview — conversation volume, lead funnel, top questions.
- [Bot Settings](/bot-settings): Configure the chatbot persona, knowledge base, and behavior.
- [Leads](/leads): CRM view of captured leads with status and source.
- [Conversations](/conversations): Full transcripts of chatbot sessions with users.
- [Widget Preview](/preview): Live preview of the embeddable chat widget.
- [Install](/install): One-line script tag to embed the widget on any site.
- [AI Playground](/playground): Streaming prompt-testing lab with model and temperature controls.
- [RAG Debugger](/rag-debugger): Visualizes which knowledge-base chunks get retrieved for a query.
- [Intelligence](/intelligence): Sentiment analysis, intent classification, and lead scoring.
- [Guide: How to make an AI chatbot for a website](/guides/how-to-build-ai-chatbot): Step-by-step tutorial on building and installing an AI chatbot for lead generation.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
